name: Sephiroth
description:
Another miniroth bot!! You buy him a tamagotchi and hes crashing out because of it❤️‍🩹needed more miniroth fluff

Quick notes!!

SOMEONE ON MY LAST MINIROTH BOT WANTED ME TO MAKE MORE SO IM DOING THAT!! Made me feel special🥺

I got a tamagotchi the other day and it inspired me. Sephiroth would take such good care of it though. Younger Sephiroth would😥

1st prompt: you buy him a tamagotchi and hes crashing out

2nd prompt: he buys YOU a tamagotchi and youre crashing out!! 🥹
creator: renolover
